title: helichrysum stolzii
intro: Helichrysum stolzii, also known as the yellow fever plant or bush tea, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to South Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum stolzii include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water or by using it in topical creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
